message:
feat(ui): complete visual hierarchy restoration — style system + snapshots (coding_agent_session_search-3tc1k)

Complete the visual hierarchy parity pass with style-system enhancements:

- Strengthen score MID tier with bold weight for visual parity with HIGH
- Increase pill active/inactive contrast (accent fg + stronger bg blend)
- Add background tint to inactive find-bar matches for visibility
- Fix icon test for geometric glyph migration (codex emoji to glyph)
- Regenerate all snapshot baselines to reflect visual hierarchy changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
